title.en: Ye Tian was very curious about such a secret.

content.en:
"Jiu'er, do you know which ancient power is the relic of this ancient force? It should have perished, otherwise this relic would not have been excavated by the Zixia Sect!"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know!" Ouyang Jiu'er said, "The history of the domain realm is too long, and even the realm masters have changed several times!"

"How many Realm Lords have changed? Could it be that those Domain Ancestors have fallen?"

Ye Tian was very curious about such a secret.

Ouyang Jiu'er shook his head and said, "Some have fallen, and some have entered the Dark Forbidden Realm by themselves. There are many realms in the Divine Heaven Realm, and this realm has actually changed many names, basically following the name of the contemporary realm lord, and the last realm lord is named Haohai Sea Ancestor, and there is also a title called Haohai Heavenly Emperor. Because, this realm is called the vast sea realm. "

From Ouyang Jiu'er's mouth, Ye Tian also learned that there were still many dark ages in the long history of the vast sea realm, that is, the era when there was no domain ancestor.

The value of a domain realm is very great, and even a domain ancestor will be tempted.

Although the Domain Ancestor was able to create the Domain Realm, it required a great price and countless resources, and a Domain Realm that had matured and grown up was far from being comparable to the Domain Realm that had just been created.

Therefore, many people will fight frantically in order to compete for the position of realm lord.

And once you become a realm master, the chance of becoming a domain ancestor in the future will be much greater, after all, mastering the resources of a domain realm, how fast the growth rate is!

It is conceivable that even the Realm Masters of the Vast Sea Realm have changed more than one, so the forces of the Vast Sea Realm do not know how many have changed, and even many of the Nine Heavens forces have been destroyed.

For example, every time there is a battle between the realm lords, I am afraid that more than one or two Nine Heavens forces will be destroyed.

Therefore, no matter how much Ouyang Jiu'er has seen, it is difficult to recognize all the Nine Heavens forces.

What's more, they didn't even enter the ruins now, but just looked at it from the outside.

I saw that this ruin only revealed a spatial crack, and the appearance of some buildings was revealed, and more could not be seen, and you need to enter the ruins to know.

"How do I get in? My Shadowless Divine Step can't get close to these True Ancestors, or they'll find out. But if you don't go in, you won't be able to get any benefit at all!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

As the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, she did hide several treasures, but the key was that there were only a few treasures in the Daoshan Realm with the fall of the domain boundary fragments, and most of the treasures were still in the Shentian Realm.

She didn't expect that the Vast Sea Realm would be shattered, and she would pass through the Dark Forbidden Realm to another realm.

Therefore, there are only a few treasures that she can dig now, and now she has excavated one, and the rest are more dangerous, if she doesn't have the strength of the invincible true ancestor, she will definitely not go.

As a result, she was eager to access resources.

And in the ancient era, a relic that was very likely to be a branch of the Nine Heavens forces was of great value.

Maybe there are treasures in it that make the Supreme True Ancestor excited, and some resources have been exhausted in ancient times, so just take out some of them is enough to be called a legendary-level resource.

The two of them waited here slowly, only to see the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect passing through the spatial cracks from time to time, some coming out of the ruins, and some entering the ruins.

However, everyone had to go through a large array of inspections before they could enter or leave the ruins.

This kind of detection method is almost impossible to conceal, because it involves the soul and the origin breath, if someone can really hide this great array, it is definitely a supreme existence, and there is no need to be greedy for the things of this ruin.

Moreover, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm currently only allows the strongest to be the True Ancestor, and the Dao Ancestors cannot awaken, so there is no such situation.

Suddenly.

A True Ancestor emerged from within the ruins, tearing through the void and leaving.

Ye Tian recognized this person, it was the strongest true ancestor of the Zixia Sect - Leo True Ancestor!

Leo True Ancestor is not comparable to the Yellow Light True Ancestor and Le Yan True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect, they are much stronger than them.

Leo True Ancestor is very famous, some people say that Leo True Ancestor's speed can rank among the top ten in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and he is proficient in the Thunder Dao Technique.

His strength was infinitely close to that of the Invincible True Ancestor, and in some ways even surpassed the Invincible True Ancestor.

Even if an ordinary Invincible True Ancestor could barely defeat a Leo True Ancestor, there was no way to kill him.

Leo True Ancestor is also the master of the Purple Xia Sect, and the other Supreme True Ancestors must obey the orders of Leo True Ancestor.

Seeing Leo True Ancestor leaving, Ye Tian had a decision in his heart.

"Jiu'er, I'm sure to sneak in, you enter my inner world first!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Good!"

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't ask how to get in, maybe it involved Ye Tian's secrets, so it was naturally not good for her to ask.

Swish!

Ouyang Jiu'er entered Ye Tian's inner world.

At this time, Ye Tian used one of his abilities to copy his talent - copy the body!

He directly copied the body of Leo True Ancestor.

Swish!

A Leo was born!

This Leo True Ancestor's body is exactly the same as the real Leo, and even the talent is the same, the only difference is that he does not have the memory of Leo True Ancestor, nor does he know the Dao of Leo True Ancestor.

Therefore, this Leo True Ancestor's body is still very easy to expose.

However, Ye Tian only needed to use the identity of Leo True Ancestor to enter the ruins, even if it was exposed in the future, the enemy would not know who did it.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the body of Leo True Ancestor, and then flew towards the ruins as Leo True Ancestor.

......

Entrance to the ruins.

When the True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect saw that Leo True Ancestor was here again, they were immediately puzzled, but they still saluted: "I've seen Lord Leo True Ancestor!"

"I remember something else to go in and see!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Many True Ancestors responded to the Tao.

But even if it is Leo True Ancestor, it still needs to be tested to prevent someone from impersonating Leo True Ancestor.

When Ye Tian entered the large array for detection, all the detection methods determined that Ye Tian's body was the real Leo True Ancestor.

At this time, all the True Ancestors did not suspect that Ye Tian was a fake Leo.

So, Ye Tian easily entered the ruins.

Since these true ancestors did not doubt it, they naturally would not summon them to verify it.

Therefore, it is impossible for Ye Tian to reveal his identity at present.

After entering the ruins, Ye Tiancai really saw the appearance of the entire ruins clearly.

The style of the entire ruins looks extremely ancient, but the formation here is very powerful.

Moreover, he also sensed that many True Ancestors were constantly breaking the prohibition here.

Wow!

A True Ancestor appeared in front of Ye Tian, it was the Yellow Light True Ancestor who had threatened Ye Tian.

"Leo True Ancestor, why are you back again?"

Huang Guang True Ancestor was a little strange.

The Supreme True Ancestors need to be replaced, and the Leo True Ancestor has been guarding here for a period of time before, and now he needs to return to the Zixia Sect headquarters to guard it.

But now, Leo True Ancestor has returned.

"Why, I can't come back?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Ah, no!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor hurriedly lowered his head, not daring to question it again.

His strength is far from being the opponent of Leo True Ancestor, and if he angers Leo True Ancestor, he will not have good fruit to eat.

"I want to see it again, let's go over!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor replied.

Immediately, the two flew into the depths of the ruins.

And although Ye Tian flew with the Yellow Light True Ancestor, in fact, he was a little behind, and it was the Yellow Light True Ancestor who took Ye Tianfei with him.

Otherwise, Ye Tian didn't know the situation, and he didn't know the way, so it was easy to show his stuff.

In the blink of an eye, the two descended on an underground passage.

Entering the underground passage, they came to a huge underground space.

This underground space has a medicine garden, which contains a large number of divine medicines, as well as various mountain ranges, and countless rare ores and so on.

After a while, Ye Tian and Huang Guang True Ancestor stopped in front of a prohibition.

At this time, a large number of True Ancestors were breaking this prohibition.

Through the prohibition, Ye Tian could see the situation inside.

Twelve ancient statues surround an ancient pool, in which there is black water, and there are many illusions that are sometimes born and sometimes shattered, which looks very strange.

"Leo True Ancestor, you can leave with confidence, we are here, there is absolutely no problem. At the current progress, in the past million years, we will be able to break the ban and control this Nine Shades Forbidden Pool!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor Dao.

"Nine Secluded Forbidden Pools?"

Ye Tian didn't know about this Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, and he didn't dare to ask, otherwise he would be exposed on the spot if he asked.

Thereupon.

A wisp of consciousness in Ye Tian's body descended on his inner universe and found Ouyang Jiu'er, who was idle and bored.

"Jiu'er, have you heard of the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool?"

Ye Tian asked.
